description: Beta patch: brings v0.5.11 fixes into 0.6 beta line — drops `git add -f` auto-retry + new `session_auto_commit` config.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(scripts): drop `git add -f` auto-retry from 0.6.0-beta.5. When `.gitignore` excludes `.polygon/`, `add_session.py` and `task.py archive` print a warning and skip auto-commit instead of force-staging.

**Enhancements:**
- feat(scripts): new `session_auto_commit: true | false` in `.polygon/config.yaml` (default `true`). Set `false` to skip auto stage + commit — journal / archive files still write to disk. Closes #245.
notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.5. Run `polygon update` — your `.polygon/config.yaml` gets a commented-out `session_auto_commit: true` block appended automatically. Uncomment and flip to `false` if your `.gitignore` excludes `.polygon/` and you want auto-commit off entirely.
